title: dd
html:
dd

File Read

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

dd if=/path/to/input-file

File Write

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

echo DATA | dd of=/path/to/output-file
excerpt: dd File Read Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged dd if=/path/to/input-file File Write Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged echo DATA | dd of=/path/to/output-file
